tool_args.label: MTA BUS Title VI Complaints Filed 2023

payload.raw_value_text: 4 Title VI and related discrimination complaints were filed

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

tool_args.label: MTA BUS 3Q23 Workforce Decreased Compared to 3Q22

payload.claim_text: MTA BUS's 3rd Quarter 2023 workforce decreased by 84 employees

tool_args.label: MTA BUS Female Workforce Constant Compared to 3Q22

payload.claim_text: The percentage of females employed in the workforce remained constant with a net change of 11 employees when compared to 3rd Quarter 2022

tool_args.label: MTA BUS Minority Workforce Increased 2 pp vs 3Q22

payload.claim_text: The percentage of minorities in the workforce has increased by 2 percentage points with a net change of 20 employees when compared to 3rd Quarter 2022

tool_args.label: MTA BUS No Title VI Complaints or Lawsuits 3Q23

payload.claim_text: MTA BUS did not receive any Title VI complaints or lawsuits during this time period

tool_args.label: MTA BUS 32 EEO Complaints Handled 3Q23

payload.claim_text: MTA BUS handled a total of 32 EEO complaints; of which 14 were internal and 18 were external (including lawsuits)

tool_args.label: MTA BUS Underutilization Categories 2023

payload.claim_text: Underrepresentation for females occurred in: Officials and Administrators – Hispanics, Professionals – Whites, Skilled Crafts – Blacks, Hispanics and Whites, Service Maintenance – Hispanics and Whites. For minority males: Officials and Administrators – Blacks, Skilled Crafts – Hispanics.

tool_args.label: MTA BUS Veteran Hiring and Separations 2023

payload.claim_text: There were 3 employees hired who self-identified as a veteran and 4 employees separated that self-identified as a veteran

tool_args.label: MTA BUS Net Increase 70 Minority Employees 2023

payload.claim_text: The result was a net increase of 70 minority employees

tool_args.label: Chairman Janno Lieber
All Generational – Generations in the Workforce Event

payload.event_name: Generations in the Workforce – A Conversation Across Generations
payload.description: A conversation Across Generations – embracing generational perspectives at the MTA. The panel included members of all five generations.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Empowering Women in Transportation Breast Cancer Awareness Walk

payload.event_name: Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk
payload.description: MTA employees united with the American Cancer Society for the Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk to raise funds and awareness. This year's walk was the 30th anniversary and it took place in Central Park.
organizers: MTA Empowering Women in Transportation ERG

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: All Generational Winter Toy and Coat Drive

payload.description: A winter toy and coat drive to benefit The Henry Street Settlement and The Bronx Defenders.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Veterans Day Ceremony

payload.description: The Veterans ERG held a luncheon ceremony to commemorate Veterans Day. Veterans were joined by MTA Veterans, Chairman Janno Lieber, Executive Sponsors, and employees.
